member.name: M:Meridian.FSharp.Domain.Sides.InferAggressorFromBBO(System.Decimal,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Decimal},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Decimal})
member.summary: Infer the aggressor side from trade price relative to BBO (Best Bid/Offer). - If trade price >= ask price, buyer is aggressor (lifted the offer) - If trade price <= bid price, seller is aggressor (hit the bid) - Otherwise, aggressor is unknown (trade inside spread or no BBO data)
